creator: shill@free.fr
text:
In the handbook's section 9.4:
http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/handbook/kernelconfig-config.html

"it is recommended that you change this option to GPL_MATH_EMULATION"

However, it seems LINT lists that option as "GPL_MATH_EMULATE".
I think the handbook is wrong.
